_README: TEMPLATE — NOT a real deploy config. Do NOT deploy from placeholder values. genesisOffset + v1MemberRoot come from the LIVE V1 snapshot (pause V1 <= #333, then contracts/tools/export-members.mjs -> gen-v1-root.mjs -> validate-snapshot.mjs). The economic caps (addrCaps / eraCaps / maxUsdcPerTx / reserveThroughSeat) MUST be transcribed from docs/proposals/SALE_V2_FINAL_DEPLOY_PARAMETER_SHEET.md (Model B; J3 address-cap ramp, J13 SYN caps, J14 per-tx) and signed off. initialRouter is intentionally NOT read here — Deploy.s.sol forces address(0) (day-one no referral; wire the CommissionRouter post-deploy via the timelocked path). All numeric values are JSON strings so big SYN caps (18dp) survive parsing.
